---
title: "Tutorials"
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "blog/*/index.qmd"
    - "blog/*/index.md"
    - "blog/*/index.ipynb"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image, description]
  image-height: "220px"
  max-description-length: 250
  feed: true
citation: false
toc: false
comments: false
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
